mck_info.address2: 2nd Floor 43 Mac Dinh Chi Street DaKao Ward, District 1
mck_info.longBusinessSummary: PetroVietnam Transportation Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of maritime transportation services to the oil and gas industry in Vietnam and internationally. It operates through four segments: Transportation Services, Oilfields Services, Trading Services, and Other Services. The company transports crude oil, refined oil products and chemicals, gas products, and coal. It also provides petroleum technical services, such as FPSO/FSO, offshore support vessels, marine survey, offshore fabrication, and installation services. In addition, the company offers onshore logistics services, including port operation, wharfage, open storage, warehousing, and office leasing; tugboat; shipping agency; vessel repair and maintenance; manpower supply of marine crew; and handling of equipment, fuel, fresh water, and lubricants. Further, it provides vessels management; maritime agent and broker; vessels and other vehicles on lease rental; temporary import for re-export marine vessels; tallying and vessel cleaning; forwarding and training; recruiting, training, and seafarers services; and export industrial, agricultural, fishery, and other groceries products, as well as transportation services by car. Additionally, the company offers surface preparation; real estate management and consulting; domestic tourism; software creation; IT solutions and equipment; air ticket selling agent; oil and gas technical; and shipping broker services, as well as engages in the trading of LPG, petroleum, and other goods and equipment; and exploit rock, sand, gravel, and clay. It operates 4 crude oil tankers, 14 product/chemical tankers, 14 LPG/CNG/LNG tankers, and 9 bulk carriers, as well as 2 FSO/FPSO. PetroVietnam Transportation Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. PetroVietnam Transportation Corporation is a subsidiary of Vietnam Oil and Gas Group.
